# anyscale_global_resource_scheduler (Data Source)

Fetches details about an Anyscale Global Resource Scheduler by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a global resource scheduler by name
data "anyscale_global_resource_scheduler" "example" {
  name = "my-machine-pool"
}

# Output the global resource scheduler details
output "machine_pool_id" {
  value       = data.anyscale_global_resource_scheduler.example.id
  description = "The unique identifier of the global resource scheduler"
}

output "organization_id" {
  value       = data.anyscale_global_resource_scheduler.example.organization_id
  description = "The organization that owns the global resource scheduler"
}

output "attached_clouds" {
  value       = data.anyscale_global_resource_scheduler.example.cloud_ids
  description = "List of cloud IDs attached to the global resource scheduler"
}

output "rootless_enabled" {
  value       = data.anyscale_global_resource_scheduler.example.enable_rootless_dataplane_config
  description = "Whether rootless dataplane is enabled"
}

# Use the global resource scheduler in other resources
resource "anyscale_compute_config" "example" {
  name     = "config-using-machine-pool"
  cloud_id = data.anyscale_global_resource_scheduler.example.cloud_ids[0]

  # Reference the global resource scheduler in cloud_deployment
  cloud_deployment {
    provider     = "AWS"
    region       = "us-west-2"
    machine_pool = data.anyscale_global_resource_scheduler.example.name
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the global resource scheduler.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_ids` (List of String) List of cloud IDs attached to this global resource scheduler.
- `enable_rootless_dataplane_config` (Boolean) Whether rootless dataplane configuration is enabled.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the global resource scheduler.
- `organization_id` (String) The organization ID that owns the global resource scheduler.
- `spec` (Attributes List) The global resource scheduler specification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))

<a id="nestedatt--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec`

Read-Only:

- `kind` (String) The type of global resource scheduler. Always `ANYSCALE_MANAGED`.
- `machine_types` (Attributes List) Machine type configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--machine_types))

<a id="nestedatt--spec--machine_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.machine_types`

Read-Only:

- `launch_templates` (Attributes List) Cloud-specific instance configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--machine_types--launch_templates))
- `name` (String) Resource identifier (e.g., `RES-8CPU-32GB`).
- `partitions` (Attributes List) Resource allocation groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--machine_types--partitions))
- `recycle_policy` (Attributes List) Instance rotation policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--machine_types--recycle_policy))

<a id="nestedatt--spec--machine_types--launch_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.machine_types.launch_templates`

Read-Only:

- `instance_type` (String) Cloud provider instance type.
- `market_type` (String) Provisioning model: `ON_DEMAND` or `SPOT`.
- `zones` (List of String) Availability zones.


<a id="nestedatt--spec--machine_types--partitions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.machine_types.partitions`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Partition name.
- `rules` (Attributes List) Scheduling rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--machine_types--partitions--rules))
- `size` (Number) Total machines in partition.

<a id="nestedatt--spec--machine_types--partitions--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.machine_types.partitions.rules`

Read-Only:

- `priority` (Number) Scheduling priority.
- `quota` (Number) Maximum machines for matching workloads.
- `selector` (String) Kubernetes-style label selector.



<a id="nestedatt--spec--machine_types--recycle_policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.machine_types.recycle_policy`

Read-Only:

- `max_idle_duration` (String) Maximum idle time before termination.
- `max_workloads` (Number) Maximum workloads before rotation.
- `rotation_interval` (String) Time interval for rotation.
